title: Dekton 134 Pc Furniture Mat Set - Assorted Sizes & Shapes| Protect Floors & Surfaces| Self-Adhesive Felt Pads| Noise & Scratch Reduction| Ideal for Chairs, Tables and Cabinets| Durable & Long-Lasting
features: Comprehensive Protection for Your Surfaces: Safeguard your floors and furniture with the Dekton 134 Pc Furniture Mat Set, featuring an assortment of self-adhesive felt pads in various sizes and shapes. This set is meticulously designed to reduce noise, prevent scratches, and shield your hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl floors.

Versatile and Multi-Purpose: This all-inclusive set is ideal for protecting a wide range of furniture, including chairs, tables, cabinets, and sofas. The assortment includes different shapes and sizes to fit the legs and bases of various furniture types, making it a versatile choice for any room in your home or office.

Premium Self-Adhesive Felt Pads: Each pad in the Dekton set is crafted from high-quality, durable felt with a strong self-adhesive backing, ensuring a secure and long-lasting bond to your furniture. The pads stay in place over time, providing continuous protection and reducing the need for frequent replacements.

Noise and Scratch Reduction: Say goodbye to the annoying sounds of furniture dragging across your floors. These felt pads effectively reduce noise while moving furniture, creating a quieter, more peaceful environment. Additionally, they minimize the risk of unsightly scratches and scuffs, preserving the beauty of your floors.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Built to withstand everyday wear and tear, the Dekton Furniture Mat Set offers exceptional durability. The felt pads are designed to endure heavy furniture and regular movement, ensuring long-lasting protection for your floors and surfaces without compromising on performance.
description: The Dekton 134 Pc Furniture Mat Set is the ultimate solution for protecting your floors and surfaces from scratches, scuffs, and unwanted noise. This comprehensive set includes an assortment of self-adhesive felt pads in various sizes and shapes, designed to fit a wide range of furniture types. Whether you’re safeguarding your hardwood floors from chair legs, keeping your tables and cabinets from leaving marks, or reducing noise caused by furniture movement, these mats are the perfect choice. Each pad is crafted from high-quality felt, providing a soft, cushioned barrier between your furniture and the floor, ensuring your surfaces remain in pristine condition. The strong adhesive ensures a secure fit, so you won’t have to worry about the pads slipping or coming off, even with frequent movement. The durable construction of these felt pads ensures they can withstand everyday wear and tear, offering long-lasting protection for your floors and surfaces. Whether you need to protect chairs, tables, cabinets, or other furniture items, the variety of sizes and shapes included in this set guarantees that you’ll find the perfect fit for any application. The soft felt material acts as a buffer, dampening the sound of furniture being moved across hard floors, making your home a quieter and more peaceful place. These pads are ideal for use on all types of flooring, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl. They’re also perfect for protecting countertops, shelves, and other surfaces from heavy objects and appliances.
